questions.question: Їй дали новий шанс.
questions.target_text: She was given a new chance.

questions.question: Новий шанс дали їй.
questions.target_text: A new chance was given to her.

questions.question: Йому надіслали листа.
questions.target_text: He was sent a letter.

questions.question: Листа надіслали йому.
questions.target_text: A letter was sent to him.

questions.question: Нам показали головну залу.
questions.target_text: We were shown the main hall.

questions.question: Ключі передали менеджеру.
questions.target_text: The keys were handed to the manager.

questions.question: Їй купили новий ноутбук.
questions.target_text: A new laptop was bought for her.

questions.question: Учням розповіли правду.
questions.target_text: The students were told the truth.

questions.question: Гіду поставили три запитання.
questions.target_text: The guide was asked three questions.

questions.question: Премію присудили переможцю.
questions.target_text: The prize was awarded to the winner.

questions.question: Нас навчили простого правила.
questions.target_text: We were taught a simple rule.

questions.question: Їм запропонували безпечний маршрут.
questions.target_text: They were offered a safe route.
